keeper: The native ruler is in the room. Place the candidate against it without looking at the marks.
interpretation: Candidate maps are built only from slot/C law-key coordinates and the native G15 edge set.
Role-hook-change values, native cocycle bits, and cycle residues are excluded from map construction.
An exact structural map is only a candidate until uniqueness and upstream construction provenance are audited.
Bit comparison remains sealed until the map is accepted independently.
boundary: Role-hook-change bits excluded from map construction.
Native cocycle bits excluded from map construction.
Crossed/parallel labels excluded from map construction.
Cycle residues excluded from map construction.
No unique native G15 embedding proof.
